## Summary / 摘要

What does this change improve?

这个 PR 改进了什么？

## Type / 类型

- [ ] Skill workflow rule
- [ ] Reference documentation
- [ ] Code snippet guidance
- [ ] Helper script
- [ ] Open-source documentation
- [ ] Bug fix

## Safety Checklist / 安全检查

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, tokens, cookies, private keys, or customer data.
- [ ] No client-specific private content.
- [ ] No rule allows launch before pages, products, articles, SEO, and QA are complete.
- [ ] No snippet guidance creates unsafe permissions, hardcoded secrets, unverified auto-submit, or global DOM mutation loops.
- [ ] Button/interactivity QA remains required.
- [ ] CSV/media import integrity remains required.
- [ ] 不包含密钥、凭据、token、cookie、私钥或客户数据。
- [ ] 不包含客户私有内容。
- [ ] 没有任何规则允许在页面、产品、文章、SEO 和 QA 完成前上线。
- [ ] 没有 snippet 指南引入危险权限、硬编码密钥、未验证自动提交或危险全局 DOM 修改。
- [ ] 按钮/交互 QA 仍然是必需项。
- [ ] CSV/媒体导入完整性仍然是必需项。

## Compatibility / 兼容性

- [ ] Works for generic AI agents, not only one tool.
- [ ] Codex-compatible.
- [ ] Claude/Trae/Cursor/OpenHands/Aider-compatible in principle.
- [ ] Provides fallback guidance when browser or REST automation is unavailable.
- [ ] 适配通用 AI Agent，不只服务某一个工具。
- [ ] 兼容 Codex。
- [ ] 原则上兼容 Claude/Trae/Cursor/OpenHands/Aider。
- [ ] 浏览器或 REST 自动化不可用时提供替代方案。

## Verification / 验证

Describe how you checked the change.

请说明你如何验证本次修改。
